value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Integration complete. 12 items shipped in branch validate-autofix-and-self-repair: pm-6qi8 (completion drift + drift test), pm-pmyq (missing_by_type), pm-c3sz (--auto-fix/--dry-run/fixes output), pm-8jss (--fix-scope lifecycle gating), pm-0v2m (moved/deleted classification + --prune-missing), pm-2cgu (calendar hint), pm-9ftr (history-repair --all), pm-xo1n (health locks check), pm-pfnx (files/docs --note), pm-6mit (plan --step accumulation), pm-0hx2 (consent CI guard), pm-df9k (optsWithGlobals at 14 lifecycle call sites + files discover). Full gate: 150 files / 2797 tests green, coverage 82.71/75.18/86.68/82.79 above ratchet. Manual E2E in 2 temp sandboxes (plain + git): plan steps x3, files/docs --note, calendar hint, missing_by_type, auto-fix dry-run+apply (resolution backfilled from close_reason), lifecycle gating (--unset parent only under --fix-scope lifecycle), moved-vs-deleted with tracked-all (moved link NOT pruned), health locks (stale+unparseable counts, locks_stale_count warning, remediation_map), history-repair --all (real chain-mismatch drift repaired, health ok:true), extension explore --global honored.

patch.value: 12 pm items shipped as one coherent self-repair PR with green gates
All items closed with per-agent tracking; coverage gate green; manual E2E in temp sandboxes passed
All 5 plan steps complete; PR follows

value.author: code-risk-subagent
value.text: Verification sub-agent pass: reviewed current diff around validate auto-fix/prune, history-repair --all, lock health scan, MCP pm_files discover dispatch, and related contracts/tests. No actionable bugs found.
